name: Trump Headquarters
subject: The “Pro-Trump” Mainstream Media?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Hillary actually wants us to believe the media is “pro-Trump.” |
---
| | |

Peter,

Since her embarrassing book came out, Hillary Clinton has been whining that the "pro-Trump media" contributed to her crushing election defeat - but real Americans know perfectly well that it was just the opposite. We've witnessed firsthand the total lack of respect in the media for President Trump, and their contempt for the "deplorable" Americans who support him.

Between June 1 and August 31, _**91% (yes, 91%)**_ of the mainstream media coverage of President Trump has been negative.[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=53163961e60f1f36952b0f989e94ce46ea3f9e537eb5bd77d0991a5fb375a15b5b16ab5ab87b3fabd7d3aaa7b9860b6b)
**We want to hear from you, the American people: HAS THE MAINSTREAM MEDIA GIVEN THE PRESIDENT FAIR, UNBIASED COVERAGE?**
**[YES](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=53163961e60f1f365c0de94e705441459d7e35f18bd1101178ba5746e714ce014cf1af369f2dcd04fb0116f61fddf6b1)** **[NO](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=53163961e60f1f36ac4565ce35737735f057c270299012e932b494fad8404c2e614a4bb84b7fce9aa542cf495392b161)**
**[Please participate in our Media Coverage poll to give us a better idea about how the President's supporters view the media's bias.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=53163961e60f1f36bae5a8c682a18fbf20bcfc2ee15057cee6a852fc3dd132d523dc82e4934794aea03c8d79e45714d8)**

Thank you,

Team TRUMP

**[TAKE THE POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=53163961e60f1f36ee1c1931359ad2662fa943f2c5c8e333e9cff9b5b9ac15bcb4b6085a22beacf9bb6c7bd79b58c176)**

name: Democrats.org
subject: We're buying your plane ticket, Derek
body:
Enter for the chance to meet Barack Obama later this month.
---
**You and a friend could meet President Obama in Washington, D.C. Pitch in $3 or more and you'll be automatically entered for the chance to win!
**[ENTER NOW](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523573/4067b0a/385c68fba/7e6019e1/1593916162/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ENTER+NOW&utm_campaign=em_20170916_bs_nd&source=em_20170916_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170916_bs_nd")**
**
Hey there, Derek --

This is Becca with the Operations Team at the DNC. We're the people who make sure that things run smoothly here at headquarters, so, usually, my job is pretty behind-the-scenes. But today's a special day because I get to connect with great supporters like you about something really neat.

We're getting ready to buy plane tickets and book a hotel room for the winner of our contest to meet President Barack Obama in D.C. But before we do, I wanted to make sure you had the chance to throw your name in the hat. Pitch in $3 or more right now, and you'll be automatically entered for your chance to win.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523573/4067b0a/385c68fba/7e6019ee/1593916162/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170916_bs_nd&source=em_20170916_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170916_bs_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523573/4067b0a/385c68fba/7e6019ef/1593916162/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170916_bs_nd&source=em_20170916_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170916_bs_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523573/4067b0a/385c68fba/7e6019ec/1593916162/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170916_bs_nd&source=em_20170916_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170916_bs_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523573/4067b0a/385c68fba/7e6019ed/1593916162/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170916_bs_nd&source=em_20170916_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170916_bs_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523573/4067b0a/385c68fba/7e6019ea/1593916162/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170916_bs_nd&source=em_20170916_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170916_bs_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523573/4067b0a/385c68fba/7e6019eb/1593916162/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170916_bs_nd&source=em_20170916_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170916_bs_nd")
** If you win, my team will take care of all the little details to ensure that your experience is the best it can possibly be. All you have to think about is who you want to bring with you for this once-in-a-lifetime experience and what you'll wear in your photo with President Obama!

Thanks for supporting Democrats, and good luck!

Becca

Becca Sharp
Director of Operations
Democratic National Committee

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523573/4067b0a/385c68fba/7e6019f4/1593916162/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170916_bs_nd&source=em_20170916_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170916_bs_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523573/4067b0a/385c68fba/7e6019f5/1593916162/VEsHBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170916_bs_nd&source=em_20170916_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170916_bs_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523573/4067b0a/385c68fba/7e6019f2/1593916162/VEsHAQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170916_bs_nd&source=em_20170916_bs_nd&refcode=em_20170916_bs_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

body:

_"Do the women get to talk around here?"_
-- House Minority Leader Nancy Pelosi
Recently the White House held a dinner for 11 people, including Nancy Pelosi -- the only woman -- where the table was asked how Trump would benefit from making a deal with Democrats on DACA and border security.
As Nancy tried to answer, the men at the table began to talk over each other, drowning her out. It was so extreme that she had to interject and demand that her voice be heard.
Sound familiar? If you're a woman, it probably does.
One step we can take to solve this problem is to put more women in leadership.
Today, women make up less than 20% of Congress. And in 2018, nearly HALF of Democratic woman Senators are up for reelection.
Tammy Baldwin and Claire McCaskill are two of them, and they're both running in extremely competitive races in states that Donald Trump won.
Giving more women a seat at the table starts with holding on to the ones we already have. And if we're going to do THAT, we need to start with our most vulnerable women -- Tammy and Claire.
**Washington Republicans are already hurling sexist, misogynistic attacks at Tammy and Claire, and these women need our help to fight back. Just take a look at what some of the most recent pundit reports are saying: | "" "" "" Peter, Joe's re-election is as critical as it is competitive. That's why we can't let up for even one second. This race will decide whether or not Indiana sends a champion who fights tooth and nail for hard-working Hoosiers back to the Senate or a "yes man" for corporate special interest groups. In short, this race is the most important in the country, and it's an election we can't afford to lose. Can you chip in $5 right now to keep Joe in the Senate working hard for Hoosier families? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" ** "" \-- Team Donnelly ""** | Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana P.O. **
Hey, Derek -- just wanted to make sure you saw Tom's email.

Opportunities like this one don't come around that often. If you want a chance to meet President Obama, you need to get your name in the hat before tomorrow at midnight.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Tom Perez
Date: Thu, Sep 14, 2017
Subject: We'll fly you out to meet President Obama

Friend --

Because you're one of our party's most committed supporters, I wanted to let you in on something big:

President Obama is joining us for an event in Washington, D.C. at the end of the month -- and you and a friend could meet him there (and get a photo, too)! [**All you have to do is chip in $10 or whatever you can to help elect Democrats, and you'll be automatically entered for a chance to win.**](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d95c/3904949018/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Meet-President-Obama-Contest-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+All+you+have+to+do+is+chip+in+10+or+what&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd")

We'll handle all the details for our lucky winner. We'll fly you and a guest of your choice to the nation's capital and put you up overnight in a great hotel. All you'll have to do is think about what you want to talk about when you meet President Obama.

Don't miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Pitch in $10 or whatever you can today to be automatically entered for the chance to join President Obama in D.C.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d958/3904949018/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d964/3904949018/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d96e/3904949018/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d96b/3904949018/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/Meet-President-Obama-Contest?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd")

** Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

|

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by 9/17/17. Enter by contributing **[here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d973/3904949018/VEsHAA/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd")** , or click **[here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d971/3904949018/VEsHAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-signup?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd")** to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Washington, DC; one (1) night's hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; the opportunity for winner and winner's guest to attend a DNC event on 9/27/17 (approximate retail value of all prizes $3,000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). Promotion subject to **[Official Rules](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d97f/3904949018/VEsHAg/ "http://my.democrats.org/meet-president-obama-contest-rules?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+Official+Rules&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd")** and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d97c/3904949018/VEsHDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d97a/3904949018/VEsHDA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d978/3904949018/VEsEBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052359e/4067b0a/383ecd211/7e60d907/3904949018/VEsEBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=21+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170916_joc_nd&source=em_20170916_joc_nd&refcode=em_20170916_joc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|
